findings.message: New Prometheus scrape job 'redis' has no corresponding alert rules file. Dashboard exists (redis.json) but no alerts defined for redis-exporter metrics.
findings.suggestion: Create infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis.yml with alert rules for Redis, such as redis_exporter_up, redis_connected_clients threshold violations, or redis_keyspace_hits_total anomalies.
